Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: What do they mean by « Quiet Revolution » ? You take your protests to the streets and your kings to the guillotine ! You do not sit in a basement, eat poutine, and hope that they magically go away.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: It is truly embarrassing for France that our own descendants would behave this way. We have perfected la formule, but crossing the ocean has évidemment scrambled leur esprits !

Line.Text: And against the Fennish, no less. This is like-- hmm, what would be a common human analogie ?
